name: BlueJammer-V2 — ESP32 engine [LAB-ONLY / illegal to operate]
label: BlueJammer-V2 — ESP32 engine [LAB-ONLY / illegal to operate]
description: EmenstaNougat/BlueJammer-V2 ESP32-WROOM-32U jamming engine (drives up to 4x nRF24L01+, 128x64 OLED). *** LAB-ONLY / ILLEGAL TO OPERATE (FCC 47 U.S.C. 333). *** Cyber Controller adds no jamming capability of its own: it FLASHES the precompiled image (pinned, SHA-256-verified bins) and reads telemetry for study. It also exposes a consent-gated remote-control surface (arm/mode behind an RF-shielded-enclosure attestation + a per-press confirm; STOP/Idle is ungated) that stays fail-safe — it refuses to send until you load a validated control map captured from your own device.

firmware_urls.note: Closed-source/precompiled — pinned v0.2 bins fetched from the GitHub Release at flash time, never vendored. Fetched + SHA-256-verified by flash_core.BlueJammerEsp32Profile.

note: esptool offsets bootloader@0x1000 / partitions@0x8000 / app@0x10000, with NO boot_app0 @0xE000 (the upstream RUN_THIS.bat omits it). Wire up to 4x nRF24L01+ on the fixed pins with a 10uF cap per module VCC/GND (brownout fix). CC flashes + reads telemetry; any arm/mode control is consent-gated and fail-safe (RF-shielded-enclosure attestation + per-press confirm; STOP/Idle ungated; nothing is sent until a user-captured, validated control map is loaded).

assets.name: BlueJammer-V2.ino.bin
assets.label: BlueJammer-V2 ESP32 app image [LAB-ONLY / illegal to operate]
